target_routes: CTU -> LAX (Chengdu to Los Angeles) round-trip, May-June 2026
PVG -> LAX (Shanghai to Los Angeles) round-trip, May-June 2026
PVG -> SFO (Shanghai to San Francisco) round-trip, May-June 2026

api_notes.access: Partner-only NDC API; no public REST endpoints

CAN-LAX.notes: Primary transpacific route from CZ hub

CTU-LAX.notes: No CZ nonstop CTU-LAX; Sichuan Airlines (3U) operates nonstop TFU-LAX

api_notes.access: No public API; site uses heavy JS rendering
api_notes.geo_restrictions: Password-gated for TW, PH, RU, KR, JP regions

PVG-SFO.notes: Both MU and United operate nonstop PVG-SFO

CTU_to_LAX.notes: No CZ nonstop CTU-LAX. Sichuan Airlines (3U) has nonstop TFU-LAX 3x/week.

LAX_to_CTU.notes: June is peak demand - 25% price increase on average. Book 2+ months ahead for 10% savings.

LAX_to_PVG.notes: MU586 daily nonstop. All carriers: flights from $353 one-way

PVG_to_SFO.notes: MU589/MU590 daily nonstop. United also operates nonstop.
